data.body:
PLAN-REVIEW REMEDIATION MARATHON + FINAL STATE for d251 (alto-fruit-punch) — continued from this same log's brainstorm/decomposition/derisk/consistency-pass entries.

=== DECOMPOSITION (final) ===
Epic d251 has 9 children: S1 (TF base) 5bfc; S2 (Gerrit + review-bot RECEIVER + nginx/TLS) 786b; S3 (project/LLM-Review label/submit-req/topic) a88d; S4a (bot identity + plugins + inbound auth) 42ba; S4b (receiver review/vote logic + backfill) 918c; S5 (replication) 4e82; S6-pre (mirror-lock pre-work) dcea; S6 (apply mirror lock) 075f; S7 (e2e + backup/restore + monitoring) 3178. Clean DAG, entry points S1 + S6-pre. (If S1 is split per the pending decision -> 10 children: S1a compute/net/access + S1b DNS/secrets/backups/packaging.)

=== KEY ARCHITECTURE CORRECTIONS (from peer-pattern research + the gate) ===
- The review-bot is a thin webhook->review->vote RECEIVER that IMPORTS the review code as a library (FastAPI), NOT the stdio MCP exposed over HTTP (Gerrit posts webhooks, not MCP; FastMCP streamable-http would reject them). Stdio MCP unchanged, agent-use only.
- Gerrit webhooks plugin has NO HMAC: inbound auth = network ACL (primary) + secret-token-in-URL (necessarily lands in refs/meta/config; bounded: access-controlled, not replicated to GitHub, rotatable).
- S6 uses terraform-provider-github >=6.8.0 NATIVE DeployKey bypass (actor_type=DeployKey, bypass_mode=always, no actor_id) — dropped the entire null_resource/gh-api/two-phase/ignore_changes dance. Empirically: actor_id:null is canonical; an active deploy-key-only ruleset REJECTS an admin push (GH013).
- copyCondition = changekind:NO_CODE_CHANGE only (dropped TRIVIAL_REBASE — it certifies a moved-base tree).
- replication: core Apache plugin, non-force, mirror=false, projects=rebar, eventsDirectory in replication.config (not gerrit.config), entrypoint hard-fails if SSM fetch fails.
- d251<->b744 SEAM = a stable adapter code_review_decision(diff)->{decision:PASS|BLOCK}. d251 'proven pipe' implements it over the EXISTING rebar.llm.review_code() (findings list -> severity-threshold decision -> LLM-Review vote, PASS->MAX, BLOCK/error->-1 fail-closed). b744-WS6 reimplements the SAME adapter over its four-pass verdict producer (gate_dispatch.produce_code_review_verdict — does NOT exist yet; b744 adds it). Receiver never calls review_code/produce_* directly, only the adapter -> drop-in swap.
- ADRs renumbered 0007-0012 (0001-0006 already taken). SSM unified under /rebar/prod/*.

=== PLAN-REVIEW GATE EXPERIENCE (dogfood signal) ===
- The gate PARSE_FAILed for ~2 sessions because ANOTHER session was mid-modifying it in this SHARED worktree (uncommitted step_budget_per_item in plan-review.yaml without the engine schema). After they landed 'calibrate per-criterion block thresholds from dogfooded data' (branch feat/plan-review-calibration-and-verify-recovery, b77e790cf), the gate works and is well-calibrated.
- PRE-calibration: non-deterministic verdicts (PASS<->BLOCK flips on unchanged/improved plans; e.g. S6 0->3->1->6 blocks), fixed ~10-advisory batch, severity-inflation (all 'critical' yet advisory), signed=True on BLOCK. I filed 2 bugs (blue-reign-quill signed-on-BLOCK; stem-poker-gecko non-determinism/calibration) then CLOSED/retracted them on instruction — that issue is owned by the other session.
- POST-calibration: convergent + every block valid. It caught real gaps in my reworking: REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_LLM no-op on the library path; review_code returns a review_result (findings), not a verdict; produce_code_review_verdict doesn't exist yet; DLM needs a service role; refs/meta/config push must be read-modify-write; webhooks {generate:true} body; eventsDirectory location; treat_missing_data=breaching for host-crash alerting; non-force replication needs projects=. All folded in.

=== FINAL VERDICTS (gate, after remediation) ===
PASS+signed: epic, S2, S3, S4a, S5, S6, S6-pre, S7. S4b: remediated 5 rounds to implementation-depth; residual finding is an ever-deeper review_code-invocation detail (diff_text->repo_root->checkout-fetch) — captured as an ACCEPTED IMPLEMENTATION NOTE on 918c (settle vs code_review.py's real signature at build time; b744 replaces the path). S1: PASS-blocked on G5 oversize -> SPLIT decision pending with user (recommend split into S1a/S1b like S4/S6).

=== ENV / PROCESS NOTES ===
- Shared worktree with another session; now on branch feat/plan-review-calibration-and-verify-recovery (their committed gate work, 2 ahead of origin/main). Did NOT touch their files; only edited rebar tickets + editable venv reinstall.
- .venv is editable; rebuild via pip install -e .[agents]. Job tmp dir cleans s*.md between turns -> operate via rebar show/edit directly (no temp-file reliance).
- Many ticket edits left origin/tickets PUSH_PENDING (best-effort push conflicts under concurrent writes) — benign, self-heals on reconcile.

OPEN: (1) S1 split decision; (2) confirm accept S4b residual as impl-note (recommended + captured).
